title: Animal words: cat, dog, fish
text: cat cat cat dog dog dog fish fish fish bee bee bee ant ant ant cow cow cow

tips.text: Animals are easy to picture — fun while you practice
Each word repeated — keep the rhythm

tips.target: cat cat cat dog dog dog fish fish fish
bee bee bee ant ant ant cow cow cow

character_tips.anna: Animals! Cat, dog, fish — picture them while you type 🌸
character_tips.maxim: Fun words help retention. Memory loves images.
character_tips.knopych: ANIMAL ZOO! 🐱🐶🐟 Type and see them!
character_tips.klavochka: All your animal friends, my sunshine 🐝🐮
